# Generated by tools/m11_decisions.py from docs/m11/decisions.csv.

# endow_public_games: P8.1;CAH-XI [secure]
# Player-facing abstraction of Roman civic benefaction rather than a claim about one festival or calendar.
antq_endow_public_games = {
	type = owncountry

	ai_tick = never
	automation_tick = never

	potential = {
		scope:actor = {
			OR = {
				tag = XAA
			}
		}
	}

	allow = {
		scope:actor = { gold >= 20 }
	}

	cooldown = {
		type = antq_endow_public_games
		years = 5
	}

	effect = {
		scope:actor = {
			add_gold = -20
			add_prestige = prestige_weak_bonus
		}
	}

	ai_will_do = {
		add = -1000
	}
}

# fund_the_annona: P8.1;CAH-XI [secure]
# Bounded representation of the plan's annona system and not an annual grain-shipment ledger.
antq_fund_the_annona = {
	type = owncountry

	ai_tick = never
	automation_tick = never

	potential = {
		scope:actor = {
			OR = {
				tag = XAA
			}
		}
	}

	allow = {
		scope:actor = { gold >= 30 }
	}

	cooldown = {
		type = antq_fund_the_annona
		years = 5
	}

	effect = {
		scope:actor = {
			add_gold = -30
			add_stability = stability_weak_bonus
		}
	}

	ai_will_do = {
		add = -1000
	}
}

# consult_the_senate: P8.1;CAH-XI [secure]
# Does not assert that the Senate could veto every imperial decision.
antq_consult_the_senate = {
	type = owncountry

	ai_tick = never
	automation_tick = never

	potential = {
		scope:actor = {
			OR = {
				tag = XAA

		type = antq_consult_the_senate
		years = 4
	}

	effect = {
		scope:actor = {
			add_gold = -10
			add_legitimacy = legitimacy_weak_bonus
		}
	}

	ai_will_do = {
		add = -1000
	}
}

# convene_a_doctrinal_assembly: P8.1;P8.2;P8.3;P8.4;CAH-XI [contested]
# Generic council mechanic not a claim of a named council before its attested date.

	type = owncountry

	ai_tick = never
	automation_tick = never

	potential = {
		scope:actor = {
			OR = {
				tag = XAA
				tag = XAH
				tag = XAR
				tag = SAT
				tag = XBB
				tag = XBC
				tag = PND
			}
		}
	}

	allow = {
		scope:actor = { gold >= 20 }
	}

	cooldown = {
		type = antq_convene_a_doctrinal_assembly
		years = 8
	}

	effect = {
		scope:actor = {
			add_gold = -20
			add_legitimacy = legitimacy_weak_bonus
		}
	}

	ai_will_do = {
		add = -1000
	}
}

# patronize_a_meditation_house: P8.4;CAH-XI [contested]
# Does not identify a monastery
antq_patronize_a_meditation_house = {
	type = owncountry

	ai_tick = never
	automation_tick = never

	potential = {
		scope:actor = {
			OR = {
				tag = SAT
				tag = XAX
				tag = YDH
				tag = ARJ
				tag = XAZ
				tag = XBB
				tag = XBC
				tag = PND
			}
		}
	}

	allow = {
		scope:actor = { gold >= 20 }
	}

	cooldown = {
		type = antq_patronize_a_meditation_house
		years = 6
	}

	effect = {
		scope:actor = {
			add_gold = -20
			add_stability = stability_weak_bonus
		}
	}

	ai_will_do = {
		add = -1000
	}
}

# protect_a_sacred_grove: P8.4;P8.6;CAH-XI [contested]
# Landscape-based abstraction without a named shrine or ownership claim.
antq_protect_a_sacred_grove = {
	type = owncountry

	ai_tick = never
	automation_tick = never

	potential = {
		scope:actor = {
			OR = {
				tag = XBI
				tag = HIM
				tag = QAT
				tag = XBJ
				tag = XBB
				tag = XBC
				tag = PND
			}
		}
	}

	allow = {
		scope:actor = { gold >= 15 }
	}

	cooldown = {
		type = antq_protect_a_sacred_grove
		years = 5
	}

	effect = {
		scope:actor = {
			add_gold = -15
			add_stability = stability_weak_bonus
		}
	}

	ai_will_do = {
		add = -1000
	}
}

# renew_warband_oaths: P8.7;CAH-XI [contested]
# Does not impose a uniform Germanic political structure.
antq_renew_warband_oaths = {
	type = owncountry

	ai_tick = never
	automation_tick = never

	potential = {
		scope:actor = {
			OR = {
				tag = XBK
				tag = CRU
				tag = XBL
				tag = XBM
				tag = XBN
				tag = SEM
				tag = HER
				tag = XBO
				tag = GUT
				tag = VAN
				tag = RUG
				tag = XBP
			}
		}
	}

	allow = {
		scope:actor = { gold >= 15 }
	}

	cooldown = {
		type = antq_renew_warband_oaths
		years = 4
	}

	effect = {
		scope:actor = {
			add_gold = -15
			add_legitimacy = legitimacy_weak_bonus
		}
	}

	ai_will_do = {
		add = -1000
	}
}

# hold_a_tribal_assembly: P8.7;CAH-XI [contested]
# Assembly is a gameplay abstraction and not a reconstructed constitution.
antq_hold_a_tribal_assembly = {
	type = owncountry

	ai_tick = never
	automation_tick = never

	potential = {
		scope:actor = {
			OR = {
				tag = XBK
				tag = CRU
				tag = XBL
				tag = XBM
				tag = XBN
				tag = SEM
				tag = HER
				tag = XBO
				tag = GUT
				tag = VAN
				tag = RUG
				tag = XBP
			}
		}
	}

	allow = {
		scope:actor = { gold >= 10 }
	}

	cooldown = {
		type = antq_hold_a_tribal_assembly
		years = 4
	}

	effect = {
		scope:actor = {
			add_gold = -10
			add_legitimacy = legitimacy_weak_bonus
		}
	}

	ai_will_do = {
		add = -1000
	}
}

# give_hall_gifts: P8.7;CAH-XI [contested]
# No claim of a named hall
antq_give_hall_gifts = {
	type = owncountry

	ai_tick = never
	automation_tick = never

	potential = {
		scope:actor = {
			OR = {
				tag = XBK
				tag = CRU
				tag = XBL
				tag = XBM
				tag = XBN
				tag = SEM
				tag = HER
				tag = XBO
				tag = GUT
				tag = VAN
				tag = RUG
				tag = XBP
			}
		}
	}

	allow = {
		scope:actor = { gold >= 20 }
	}

	cooldown = {
		type = antq_give_hall_gifts
		years = 5
	}

	effect = {
		scope:actor = {
			add_gold = -20
			add_prestige = prestige_weak_bonus
		}
	}

	ai_will_do = {
		add = -1000
	}
}

# settle_a_blood_feud: P8.7;CAH-XI [contested]
# Does not assert a uniform legal tariff or ethnic custom.
antq_settle_a_blood_feud = {
	type = owncountry

	ai_tick = never
	automation_tick = never

	potential = {
		scope:actor = {
			OR = {
				tag = XBK
				tag = CRU
				tag = XBL
				tag = XBM
				tag = XBN
				tag = SEM
				tag = HER
				tag = XBO
				tag = GUT
				tag = VAN
				tag = RUG
				tag = XBP
			}
		}
	}

	allow = {
		scope:actor = { gold >= 20 }
	}

	cooldown = {
		type = antq_settle_a_blood_feud
		years = 6
	}

	effect = {
		scope:actor = {
			add_gold = -20
			add_stability = stability_weak_bonus
		}
	}

	ai_will_do = {
		add = -1000
	}
}

# convene_a_desert_caravan: P8.5;P8.6;CAH-XI [contested]
# No claim about a named route or a fixed state monopoly.
antq_convene_a_desert_caravan = {
	type = owncountry

	ai_tick = never
	automation_tick = never

	potential = {
		scope:actor = {
			OR = {
				tag = XBF
				tag = AKS
				tag = XBI
				tag = XBJ
			}
		}
	}

	allow = {
		scope:actor = { gold >= 20 }
	}

	cooldown = {
		type = antq_convene_a_desert_caravan
		years = 5
	}

	effect = {
		scope:actor = {
			add_gold = -20
			add_prestige = prestige_weak_bonus
		}
	}

	ai_will_do = {
		add = -1000
	}
}

# honor_a_royal_copartnership: P8.5;CAH-XI [secure]
# Bounded reference to Kushite co-rule and not a general dynastic reconstruction.
antq_honor_a_royal_copartnership = {
	type = owncountry

	ai_tick = never
	automation_tick = never

	potential = {
		scope:actor = {
			OR = {
				tag = XBE
			}
		}
	}

	allow = {
		scope:actor = { gold >= 15 }
	}

	cooldown = {
		type = antq_honor_a_royal_copartnership
		years = 5
	}

	effect = {
		scope:actor = {
			add_gold = -15
			add_legitimacy = legitimacy_weak_bonus
		}
	}

	ai_will_do = {
		add = -1000
	}
}

# fund_an_exchange_feast: P8.10;CAH-XI [contested]
# Does not define a uniform North American institution or a dated ceremony.
antq_fund_an_exchange_feast = {
	type = owncountry

	ai_tick = never
	automation_tick = never

	potential = {
		scope:actor = {
			OR = {
				tag = XCY
				tag = XDG
				tag = XDH
			}
		}
	}

	allow = {
		scope:actor = { gold >= 15 }
	}

	cooldown = {
		type = antq_fund_an_exchange_feast
		years = 5
	}

	effect = {
		scope:actor = {
			add_gold = -15
			add_prestige = prestige_weak_bonus
		}
	}

	ai_will_do = {
		add = -1000
	}
}

# support_ocean_wayfinding: P8.9;CAH-XI [contested]
# Applies only to the plan's western-Oceanian scope and does not imply eastern Polynesian settlement.
antq_support_ocean_wayfinding = {
	type = owncountry

	ai_tick = never
	automation_tick = never

	potential = {
		scope:actor = {
			OR = {
				tag = XCO
				tag = MEL
				tag = XDS
			}
		}
	}

	allow = {
		scope:actor = { gold >= 20 }
	}

	cooldown = {
		type = antq_support_ocean_wayfinding
		years = 6
	}

	effect = {
		scope:actor = {
			add_gold = -20
			add_stability = stability_weak_bonus
		}
	}

	ai_will_do = {
		add = -1000
	}
}
